issues.title: Retries surface a ghost 500 after ECONNRESET
issues.body: Checkout retries a reset payment-gateway connection but loses the original response context. The incident review found three retries clustered around a deploy.

issues.title: Session renewal races logout in a second browser tab
issues.body: A stale refresh response can recreate a cookie after the user explicitly signs out. Resolved by binding renewal to the session version in src/auth/session.ts.

issues.title: Webhook replay duplicates fulfillment notifications
issues.body: The provider retried a delivery after our 502 and fulfillment sent a second customer email. Added delivery-id persistence before dispatch.

issues.title: Redis security group lacks a documented egress exception
issues.body: Production Redis could only be reached because the broad application egress rule masked the intended boundary. Narrowed the Terraform rule and documented the service CIDR.

issues.title: Checkout trace omits upstream request id
issues.body: On-call could not correlate a 502 to the gateway logs. The HTTP client now carries x-request-id into structured retry logs.

issues.title: Password reset tokens remain usable after a password change
issues.body: Changing a password did not revoke an earlier reset token. Fixed by comparing token session_version to the current account session.

issues.title: Retry backoff ignores Retry-After from rate-limited gateway
issues.body: The payment gateway returned 429 with Retry-After, but src/http/retry.ts immediately retried and amplified the rate limit. Resolved with capped server-directed backoff.

issues.title: Staging task role can read production parameter path
issues.body: A copied IAM path wildcard crossed environments. The Terraform module now receives an environment-scoped parameter prefix.

issues.title: Cart reservation expiry is not idempotent
issues.body: Two queue deliveries decrement inventory twice when a reservation expires. The worker now records the transition before stock adjustment.

issues.title: Admin audit export leaks internal session id
issues.body: The CSV export included a session identifier that should not leave the control plane. Removed the field and added a column allowlist test.

issues.title: Canary health check retries indefinitely during DNS outage
issues.body: A failed resolver lookup did not consume the retry budget, leaving a deploy in canary forever. Counted DNS failures and added an explicit deadline.

issues.title: OIDC callback accepts an already-consumed state nonce
issues.body: Parallel callbacks could validate the same nonce before deletion. Replaced read/delete with an atomic consume operation in src/auth/session.ts.

issues.title: Receipt worker retries permanently invalid address payloads
issues.body: A 400 from the mailing API was retried as a transport error. The classifier now marks provider validation failures as terminal.

issues.title: Terraform plan permits public ingress to debug metrics
issues.body: An example CIDR was copied into the shared module. Replaced the public ingress with the observability security-group reference.

issues.title: Checkout gives up before the gateway's documented SLA
issues.body: The client timeout was 800ms while the provider SLA allows 1.5 seconds. Tuned the first attempt while preserving the overall request budget.

issues.title: Order confirmation can outlive a cancelled checkout
issues.body: The confirmation job did not check the checkout cancellation marker. Added a final state read immediately before sending email.

issues.title: Refresh token key rotation drops sessions during regional failover
issues.body: One region cached only the newest signing key. The verifier now keeps the active and previous kid until the grace period expires.

issues.title: Worker deploy rolls back when image digest is unavailable
issues.body: The deployer treated a temporary registry lookup error as an invalid immutable digest. Retried the lookup with the deployment deadline.

issues.title: Saved card webhook retries cross the customer boundary
issues.body: A reused job object retained a previous customer id after a retry. The queue payload is now reconstructed from immutable event data.

issues.title: CloudWatch alarm does not page for sustained checkout 5xx
issues.body: The alarm evaluated a sparse metric as missing rather than breaching. Updated the Terraform alarm to treat missing data as breaching for checkout failures.

plans.root_cause_hypothesis: ECONNRESET was retried without preserving provider context.
plans.test_strategy: Simulate a reset connection and assert context survives the retry.

assignee.why: Primary maintainer for the HTTP retry client.
